description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named CI-MacOS that runs on every push to the master branch and on pull requests to master. The workflow should also allow manual triggering with an optional debug_enabled input. Configure the workflow to run on a MacOS environment with a 120-minute timeout, and perform a series of steps including checking out the repository, initializing submodules, installing dependencies, fixing SQL, installing CMake, macdeployqtfix, and optool, caching Qt, installing Qt, creating a build directory, configuring and building the project, codesigning and notarizing the bundle, and uploading the DMG as an artifact.
